Author: GitHub
Description:
This week on The Download, GPS dives into the social media debate over whether MCP is dead and why FastMCP is hosting a funeral for it. We also look at Perplexity's new Personal Computer announcement for always-on AI agents. Plus, check out how one developer got Doom running on the GitHub Universe badge. Finally, say goodbye to label hacks because GitHub Issue Fields are officially in public preview.

#DevNews #MCP #AI

00:00 Welcome to The Download 00:43 Is MCP dead? 02:41 Perplexity announces personal computer 03:51 Running Doom on the GitHub Universe badge 05:12 GitHub Issue Fields in public preview 06:33 Outro
